metadata.name: Image Analysis
metadata.description: Visual question answering and image analysis using VisionAgent
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Image Path
inputs.description: Path to image file (PNG, JPG, etc.)

inputs.name: Question
inputs.default: What objects can you see in this image?

outputs.name: Answer
outputs.description: Answer to the question about the image

outputs.name: Detected Objects
outputs.description: List of objects detected in the image

documentation.overview: This workflow analyzes images and answers visual questions using VisionAgent with GPT-4 Vision or Ollama vision models (llava, bakllava). It can perform tasks like object detection, OCR, scene understanding, and visual question answering. Perfect for document processing, image classification, and visual search applications.
use_cases: Document OCR and text extraction from images
Product image analysis for e-commerce cataloging
Medical image analysis and diagnosis assistance
Receipt and invoice processing for expense management
Accessibility: image description for visually impaired users
prerequisites: OpenAI API key (for GPT-4 Vision) or Ollama installed (for llava/bakllava)
Image file accessible via file path
Internet connection for cloud API (if using OpenAI)
Supported image formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP

example_inputs.question: What is the total amount on this receipt?
Describe this product and its key features

example_outputs.answer: The receipt shows a total amount of $47.23, including tax of $3.85. The purchase was made at Coffee Shop Inc. on October 6, 2025 at 2:30 PM.

This product is a wireless Bluetooth speaker with a cylindrical design. Key features include: waterproof construction (IPX7 rating), 360-degree sound, USB-C charging port, and fabric covering in blue color.
